hero.title: Everything on the canals,
hero.sub: From electric boat hire to sunset cruises — discover, compare and book every water activity on the Amsterdam canals.

story.label: Why the canals?
story.title: Amsterdam is best seen
story.text: The Grachtengordel — Amsterdam's famous canal ring — is a UNESCO World Heritage site. Over 400 years old, lined with merchant houses, hidden courtyards, and drawbridges that only open by water. No bus or bike gives you this view.

map.label: Find your spot
map.title: Departure points
map.heading: 15+ locations across Amsterdam
map.sub: All departure points in one map — filter by activity and find what's nearest to you.
map.tip: Click a pin to see details. Filter by activity type.

cta.label: Ready to go?
cta.title: The canals are waiting
cta.sub: Pick an activity, grab a spot, and experience Amsterdam the way it was meant to be seen — from the water.

footer.desc: The platform for all water activities on the Amsterdam canals. Compare, discover and book.

about.pageSub: The platform for everyone who wants to discover Amsterdam on the water.
about.storyP1: Amsterdam has over 100 kilometres of canals and dozens of providers of water activities. But as a tourist it was nearly impossible to get an overview. You had to search ten different websites, compare prices, read reviews — while all you really wanted was to be on the water.
about.storyP2: OnTheCanals.Amsterdam solves that. We bring all water activities together on one platform: from classic canal tours and electric boats to SUP lessons, kayak and private cruises. Compare, choose and book — all in one place, in 7 languages.
about.step1Desc: Browse all activities on the canals and filter by your preferences.
about.step2Desc: View prices, ratings and details side by side.
about.step3Desc: Book directly with the provider via their own secure system.
about.providerTitle: Are you a provider on the canals?
about.providerSub: Join OnTheCanals.Amsterdam and reach thousands of tourists per month. Free to sign up, commission-based model.

contact.pageSub: Questions, suggestions or want to list your activity? Get in touch.
contact.providerSub: Select "I am a provider" in the form and describe your service. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.sentSub: We'll get back to you as soon as possible.

activityDetail.bookingNotice: You'll be taken to {provider}'s website to complete your booking.
